texto: . . since [no] women whose acquaintance I had made in fiction had much to do with the life I led or wanted to lead, I was not female. . . . if Molly Bloom was a woman. what was I? A mutant or a dinosaur.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Lee R. Edwards que provoca sentido da existência e experiência vivida. Ao questionar “. . since [no] women whose acquaintance I had made in fiction had much to do with the life I led …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, women, since, com foco em reflexao.
